name: a Student from TRR
title: STUDENT
content: Thanks to FEEDX, I never miss important updates about exams or opportunities. The team’s dedication to sharing useful content really helps us stay prepared and confident. I hope FEEDX continues to expand into areas like interview preparation, resume building, and skill development, which would be a great benefit for all students

name: a student from GPT
title: STUDENT
content: What I like most about FEEDX is the way it connects with students. The posts are not only informative but also motivating. Many of us rely on FEEDX for clarity on government schemes, internships, and career tips. It’s more than just an information platform—it’s a support system for students.

name: a student from GIOE
title: STUDENT
content: FEEDX has become a trusted source for students like me. The updates on exams, results, and job opportunities are always accurate and timely. I especially how FEEDX explains things in a simple way that makes it easy for diploma students to understand. It feels like having a reliable guide throughout our academic journey.
